name: Blackwing - Etesian of Two Swords

name_jp_tl: Black Feather - Etesian of Two Tachis
desc: If a "Blackwing" monster you control battles an opponent's monster, and your opponent still controls that monster at the end of the Damage Step: You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; inflict 1000 damage to your opponent.
mnst_eff: If a "Blackwing" monster you control battles an opponent's monster, and your opponent still controls that monster at the end of the Damage Step: You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; inflict 1000 damage to your opponent.
eff: If a "Blackwing" monster you control battles an opponent's monster, and your opponent still controls that monster at the end of the Damage Step: You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; inflict 1000 damage to your opponent.

action: Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
